TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Elmer_Bennett, title = Elmer_Bennett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elmer_Bennett} }

S.FORM: Elmer Bennett Elmer Bennett Elmer Bennett nalecuhan i Evanston, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Elmer Bennett i 1992 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 38, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 2 bulad 13 demiad, 1970 a mihca, Elmer Bennett, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ônn…ôtt …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ônn…ôtt …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ônn…ôtt nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i …ô*anston, ir~…ær~…æinois, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ônn…ôtt i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu atr~…æanta ƒßawks putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, …ôr~…æm…ôr b…ônn…ôtt, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Elmer Bennett Elmer Bennett Elmer Bennett nalecuhan i Evanston, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Elmer Bennett i 1992 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 38, namapili' tu nu Atlanta Hawks putiput. 2 bulad 13 demiad, 1970 a mihca, Elmer Bennett, miunduay.
